brief: DTMMax 90-savollik blok test joylashni oson va ishonchli qilish

goals.title: Blok-bo'limli forma
goals.objective: DTM_BLOCK formasini 5 blok bo'limiga o'tkazish, auto blockType, sticky nazorat panel
goals.evidence: TeacherPanel.tsx: DTM savollar 5 blok bo'limiga guruhlandi (renderQuestionCard + section render), sticky nazorat panel (58px, chip'lar scrollIntoView), blok ichidan +Savol avto blockType; tsc --noEmit va vite build toza

goals.title: Blok AI import
goals.objective: Har blok bo'limiga alohida AI import, SPECIALTY_1 majburlashni olib tashlash
goals.evidence: generateBlockFromFile(): har blokka alohida AI import, blok fani avtomatik, limit trim + toast; global AI karta DTM'da yashirildi

goals.title: Tasdiq badge
goals.objective: Teacher ro'yxatida approved=false public testga 'Tasdiq kutilmoqda' belgisi
goals.evidence: Ro'yxatda isPublic&&approved===false uchun 'Tasdiq kutilmoqda' badge; submit va toggleVisibility'da aniq toast

goals.title: Saqlash guardlari
goals.objective: Rasm yuklanayotganda submit bloklash + qoralama avtosaqlash
goals.evidence: submit'da rasm yuklanish guard; localStorage qoralama (800ms debounce), banner Tiklash/O'chirish, saqlashda tozalanadi

goals.title: Verifikatsiya
goals.objective: Frontend build+tsc toza o'tishi, commit va push
goals.evidence: TeacherPanel.tsx + backend tests.ts o'zgartirildi, build/tsc toza
